---
title: ggplot2
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

TODO

Ggplot 45 degree axis labels

Ggplot rbind/cbind plots to make the axes line up

Ggplot position dodge same width

Ggmap examples
